semantic.role: CLI runtime bootstrap orchestrator for initializing a new ArchSpine project: coordinates LLM credential setup, language discovery, and optional build run during `spine init`.
responsibilities: Orchestrate the full bootstrap sequence for a new project: resolve LLM settings, prompt for LLM setup if not configured, discover project languages, and optionally run the initial build.
Prompt the user to confirm initial synchronization (sync) before proceeding with the build.
Display language discovery results and step-by-step progress via console output.
outOfScope: LLM provider selection and provider-specific API calls (handled by LLM services).
Build logic and compilation (delegated to runBuildWorkflow).
invariants: CLI entrypoints must remain thin adapters and not absorb core pipeline or persistence logic (Rule: cli-entrypoint-separation).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a clean, interactive bootstrap experience for new ArchSpine users via the CLI, separating orchestration from business logic.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of the v1.0.0 GA release establishing ArchSpine as an architectural governance and semantic layer tool.

publicSurface.description: Orchestrates the full runtime initialization sequence: checks LLM settings, prompts for setup, discovers languages, and optionally runs the build workflow. Called by the `spine init` CLI command.
Interactive confirmation prompt asking the user to agree to an initial file synchronization before the bootstrap proceeds.
